metadata.album: The Very Best of Freddie Mercury Solo: Lover of Life, Singer of Songs
metadata.lyrics:
[00:00.43] Dee do de de, dee do de de
[00:06.04] Sometimes I feel I'm gonna break down and cry (so lonely)
[00:09.90] Nowhere to go, nothing to do with my time
[00:12.98] I get lonely, so lonely, Living On My Own.
[00:56.44] Sometimes I feel I'm always walking too fast (so lonely)
[01:15.89] And everything is coming down on me, down on me, I go crazy
[01:22.33] Oh so crazy - Living On My Own.
[01:31.08] Dee do de de, dee do de de
[01:34.51] I don't have no time for no monkeybusiness
[01:38.76] Dee do de de, dee do de de
[01:41.95] I get so lonely, lonely, lonely, lonely, yeah
[01:46.56] Got to be some good times ahead
[01:50.72] Sometimes I feel nobody gives me no warning
[01:54.75] Find my head is always up in the clouds in a dreamworld
[02:01.13] It's not easy - Living On My Own, my own, my own
[02:11.73] Dee do de de, dee do de de
[02:32.65] I don't have no time for no monkeybusiness
[02:36.90] Dee do de de, dee do de de
[02:40.10] I get so lonely, lonely, lonely, lonely, yeah
[02:44.71] Got to be some good times ahead

[04:56.03] I don't have no time for no monkeybusiness
[04:58.89] Dee do de de, dee do de de
[05:03.48] I get so lonely, lonely, lonely, lonely, yeah
